subcodes.first_line: A company of hypocrites have outwardly made claim to unity, while inwardly they have conspired with the enemies [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: جمعی از منافقین در ظاهر ادعای وفاق نموده اند و در باطن باعداء اتفاق شده
subcodes.subjects: @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @prayer for nearness to God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @suffering and imprisonment, @chastisement and requital, @praise and encouragement
